debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq α
inst✝ : SampleableType α
s : Skeleton
leaf_data_tree : LeafData α s
idx : SkeletonLeafIndex s
preexisting_cache : QueryCache (InductiveMerkleTree.spec α)
⊢ HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail
    (((fun {α_1} x => (simulateQ randomOracle).toFun α_1 x) do
          let cache ← InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α s leaf_data_tree
          let proof : List α := InductiveMerkleTree.generateProof α s cache idx
          let __discr ← InductiveMerkleTree.verifyProof α inst✝¹ s idx (leaf_data_tree.get idx) cache.getRootValue proof
          let x : Option Unit := __discr
          pure PUnit.unit).run
      preexisting_cache)

failed_attempts:
revert preexisting_cache
  rw [randomOracle_neverFails_iff_runWithOracle_neverFails]
  intro f
  simp_rw [verifyProof, guard_eq, bind_pure_comp, id_map', runWithOracle_bind,
    runWithOracle_buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_getPutativeRoot]
  simp only [apply_ite, runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_failure, Option.bind_eq_bind,
    Option.bind_some, Option.isSome_some, Option.isSome_none, Bool.if_false_right, Bool.and_true,
    decide_eq_true_eq]
  exact functional_completeness α idx leaf_data_tree fun left right ↦ f () (left, right)

apply randomOracle_neverFails
  intro f
  induction s generalizing idx leaf_data_tree with
  | leaf =>
    cases leaf_data_tree; cases idx
    simp [buildMerkleTree, generateProof, verifyProof, getPutativeRoot, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_query, LeafData.get]
  | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
    cases leaf_data_tree; cases idx
    · simp [buildMerkleTree, generateProof, verifyProof, getPutativeRoot, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_query, ih_left, LeafData.get]
    · simp [buildMerkleTree, generateProof, verifyProof, getPutativeRoot, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_query, ih_right, LeafData.get]

revert preexisting_cache
  rw [randomOracle_neverFails_iff_runWithOracle_neverFails]
  intro f
  have h_build {s} (t : LeafData α s) : runWithOracle (f ()) (buildMerkleTree t) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash t (fun l r => f () (l, r)) := by
    induction s <;> cases t <;> simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash, query, *]
  have h_root {s} (i : SkeletonLeafIndex s) (v : α) (p : List α) : runWithOracle (f ()) (getPutativeRoot i v p) = getPutativeRoot_with_hash i v p (fun l r => f () (l, r)) := by
    induction p generalizing s <;> (cases s <;> cases i <;> simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash, query, *])
  simp [verifyProof, h_build, h_root, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, guard_eq, bind_pure_comp, id_map', Option.bind_eq_bind, Option.bind_some, decide_eq_true_eq, functional_completeness]

end InductiveMerkleTree

have runWithOracle_buildMerkleTree {s} (dt : LeafData α s) (f : Unit → α × α → α) : runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree dt) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash dt (fun l r => f () (l, r)) := by
    induction dt with | leaf a => simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_pure] | internal l r ihl ihr => simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, ihl, ihr]; rfl
  have runWithOracle_getPutativeRoot {s} (idx : SkeletonLeafIndex s) (v : α) (p : List α) (f : Unit → α × α → α) : runWithOracle f (getPutativeRoot idx v p) = getPutativeRoot_with_hash idx v p (fun l r => f () (l, r)) := by
    induction p generalizing s idx with | nil => simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_pure] | cons h t ih => cases s <;> cases idx <;> simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, ih]; rfl
  -- An OracleComp is never failing on any preexisting cache
  -- if it never fails when run with any oracle function.
  revert preexisting_cache
  rw [randomOracle_neverFails_iff_runWithOracle_neverFails]
  -- Call this hash function `f`
  intro f
  -- Simplify
  simp_rw [verifyProof, guard_eq, bind_pure_comp, id_map', runWithOracle_bind,
    runWithOracle_buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_getPutativeRoot]
  simp only [apply_ite, runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_failure, Option.bind_eq_bind,
    Option.bind_some, Option.isSome_some, Option.isSome_none, Bool.if_false_right, Bool.and_true,
    decide_eq_true_eq]
  exact functional_completeness α idx leaf_data_tree fun left right ↦ f () (left, right)

revert preexisting_cache
  rw [randomOracle_neverFails_iff_runWithOracle_neverFails]
  intro f
  let h_f := fun l r => f () (l, r)
  have h_build {s} (t : LeafData α s) : runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree t) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash t h_f := by
    induction s generalizing t with | leaf => cases t; rfl | internal _ _ ihl ihr => cases t; simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, ihl, ihr, singleHash, runWithOracle_query]
  have h_root {s} (i : SkeletonLeafIndex s) (v : α) (p : List α) : runWithOracle f (getPutativeRoot i v p) = getPutativeRoot_with_hash i v p h_f := by
    induction p generalizing s i with | nil => rfl | cons h t ih => cases s with | leaf => cases i; rfl | internal sl sr => cases i with | ofLeft iL => simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, ih, singleHash, runWithOracle_query] | ofRight iR => simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, ih, singleHash, runWithOracle_query]
  simp [verifyProof, guard_eq, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, h_build, h_root, functional_completeness α idx leaf_data_tree h_f]

revert preexisting_cache
  rw [randomOracle_neverFails_iff_runWithOracle_neverFails]
  intro f
  have runWithOracle_buildMerkleTree {s} (tree : LeafData α s) :
      runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree tree) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash tree (fun l r ↦ f () (l, r)) := by
    induction s with
    | leaf => cases tree; simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_pure]
    | internal sl sr il ir => cases tree; simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, il, ir, runWithOracle_pure]
  have runWithOracle_getPutativeRoot {s} (i : SkeletonLeafIndex s) (v : α) (p : List α) :
      runWithOracle f (getPutativeRoot i v p) = getPutativeRoot_with_hash i v p (fun l r ↦ f () (l, r)) := by
    induction p generalizing s with
    | nil => simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_pure]
    | cons h t ih =>
      simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, ih, runWithOracle_pure]
      cases s <;> cases i <;> simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash, runWithOracle_bind, ih, runWithOracle_pure]
  simp_rw [verifyProof, guard_eq, bind_pure_comp, id_map', runWithOracle_bind,
    runWithOracle_buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_getPutativeRoot]
  simp only [apply_ite, runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_failure, Option.bind_eq_bind,
    Option.bind_some, Option.isSome_some, Option.isSome_none, Bool.if_false_right, Bool.and_true,
    decide_eq_true_eq]
  exact functional_completeness α idx leaf_data_tree fun left right ↦ f () (left, right)

revert preexisting_cache
  rw [randomOracle_neverFails_iff_runWithOracle_neverFails]
  intro f
  have hb {s} (lt : LeafData α s) :
      runWithOracle (fun x => f () x) (buildMerkleTree lt) =
      buildMerkleTree_with_hash lt (fun l r => f () (l, r)) := by
    induction lt with
    | leaf a => rfl
    | internal l r ihl ihr => simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, ihl, ihr, singleHash, runWithOracle_query]
  have hg {s} (i : SkeletonLeafIndex s) lv p :
      runWithOracle (fun x => f () x) (getPutativeRoot i lv p) =
      getPutativeRoot_with_hash i lv p (fun l r => f () (l, r)) := by
    induction p generalizing s i with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons h t ih =>
      simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
      cases s with
      | leaf => cases i; rfl
      | internal sl sr =>
        cases i with
        | ofLeft il => simp [runWithOracle_bind, ih, singleHash, runWithOracle_query]
        | ofRight ir => simp [runWithOracle_bind, ih, singleHash, runWithOracle_query]
  simp_rw [verifyProof, guard_eq, bind_pure_comp, id_map', runWithOracle_bind, hb, hg]
  simp only [apply_ite, runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_failure, Option.bind_eq_bind,
    Option.bind_some, Option.isSome_some, Option.isSome_none, Bool.if_false_right, Bool.and_true,
    decide_eq_true_eq, functional_completeness]

  simp_rw [verifyProof, guard_eq, bind_pure_comp, id_map', runWithOracle_bind,
    runWithOracle_buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_getPutativeRoot]
  simp only [apply_ite, runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_failure, Option.bind_eq_bind,
    Option.bind_some, Option.isSome_some, Option.isSome_none, Bool.if_false_right, Bool.and_true,
    decide_eq_true_eq, HasEvalSPMF.neverFail_pure, ite_true]
  exact functional_completeness α idx leaf_data_tree fun left right ↦ f () (left, right)
